title: Survivor Horde

modifiers.description: Modifier ids attached to the run.

architectureContract.executionPath: compileRuntimeSpec -> LoreWeaverRuntimeKernel -> adapter registry -> host ports
architectureContract.hostRule: IDE simulator and standalone export consume the same resolved runtime spec and adapter implementation; hosts may only differ in persistence, logging, asset location and container ports.
prohibited: copying legacy NodeScene executable code into this card
theme-specific skill or enemy branches in the adapter
Workbench-only runtime patches that bypass canonical spec compilation
standalone gameplay dispatch copied from the IDE host

contract: range, damage, pause and lifecycle policies
accepted gameplay event precedes presentation event
VFX/SFX/callout emitted only after accepted use
theme content supplied by ability catalog
no theme-specific labels in executable core
move data supplied by enemy catalog

bossPhases.owner: boss phase modifier + enemy action state machine

contract: event includes source, action, accepted outcome, cue id, callout and VFX intent
voice is optional; visual callout is required fallback
runtime never grants rewards from presentation callbacks

assertions: no console error during 10 second smoke run
accepted player damage emits one gameplay event
reward is applied before success presentation
injected random source produces a stable state trace

knownRisks: scene cleanup and timer cleanup are historically fragile
too many one-off subclasses can undermine modifier composition
deterministic random injection exists in the adapter but full seed/spec parity remains pending
planned_migration capability contracts are not implementation claims
semantic presentation events still require the shared host resolver for real audio and voice playback
implementationNotes: Card stores contracts and configuration only. Executable behavior belongs to the shared core; legacy node scenes remain provenance and parity fixtures, never a second production runtime. Channel interaction slice implemented 2026-07-18; ability/upgrades/enemy action parity remains tracked work.
